LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED NOVEMBER 12, 2019. THE COURT NOTES, HOWEVER, THAT PLAINTIFFS DID NOT TIMELY FILE AND SERVE THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT "NO LATER THAN THE DATE FOR FILING AN OPPOSITION TO THE DEMURRER," AS REQUIRED. (CODE CIV. PROC. 472.) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-14-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, GREGORY SUHR'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Off calendar. First amended complaint dismissed with prejudice 1/6/20.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2019 Continued To Feb-11-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-20-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Off calendar. First amended complaint filed November 12, 2019. The court notes, however, that Plaintiffs did not timely file and serve the first amended complaint "no later than the date for filing an opposition to the demurrer," as required. (Code Civ. Proc. 472.)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
